## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation / CI / tooling

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? What should the reviewer look at? -->

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] Built and ran on emulator/device
- [ ] Tested on cineby.at (which page? what did you tap?)

## Screenshots / screen recordings

If this changes visible behavior, attach before/after.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](README.md) (the build patch and project constraints)
- [ ] I did NOT change generated icon files unless this PR is specifically about icons
- [ ] I did NOT add a new top-level dependency without justification in the PR body
- [ ] I did NOT regenerate `pubspec.lock` unless dependencies actually changed
